Describe how you tested this change.

## Checklist

- [ ] Code changes are in `src/analyze_job/cli.py` and/or `server/proxy.py`
- [ ] Documentation updated in `docs/` if behavior changed
- [ ] `docs/changelog.md` entry added under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or site-specific paths committed
- [ ] `.gitignore` keeps `etc/` excluded (runtime config not in repo)
